title: Hard++
description: Minecraft is to esay? Try the Hard++ Datapack for 1.18+
body:
# Minecraft but it's harder. plus plus.

## Features
(as in v0.1.1, this changelog may change after a new version is out)

<details>
<summary>Features (may have spoilers)</summary>

**Features which do damage:**
- in tall grass~~~~
- wither effect in water
- fire is more deadly
- lava is more deadly

**Anyoing Features:**
- No Cobblestone in Inventory when on Clean Stone.
- When on deepslate no nightvision (you have night vision by default)
- Snowness effect when on moss block

**Features with Mobs:**
- Skeleton have knockback lvl 255 swords
- Skeleton are invisible
- Spiders are FAST
- Only Baby Zombies
- Strays have flame Bows

**Block Replacement Features:** (5 Block Radius)
- Stone replaces coal ore
- all logs are replace by their plank form
- Powder Snow replaces Snow Blocks
- Air replaces Snow (layer)
- Water replaces Ice

**Other Features:**
- Some Food will be gone, when dropped
- It is always night
- It doesn't rain
- No Saplings in the inventory
</details>
